## ItemsList class

It renders a list of [ListItem](./x-components.listitem.md) providing a slot for each `slotName` which depends on the `modelName`<!-- -->of the item.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class ItemsList extends Vue 
```
<b>Extends:</b> Vue

## Properties

|  Property | Modifiers | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  [animation](./x-components.itemslist.animation.md) |  | Vue \| string | Animation component that will be used to animate the list. |
|  [items](./x-components.itemslist.items.md) |  | [ListItem](./x-components.listitem.md)<!-- -->\[\] | List of items. |
